title: 2026 Oscars Best Production Design Predictions
text: Clayton Davis, Variety's chief awards editor, provides predictions for the 2026 Oscars Best Production Design category. The article questions whether Frankenstein is positioned as a lock to win. Featured films include Frankenstein (Netflix) and Hamnet (Focus Features). The Variety Awards Circuit section functions as their central awards coverage hub, providing updated predictions for the Oscars refreshed weekly on Thursdays. The commentary was last updated March 2, 2026, with voting scheduled for February 26 to March 5. The complete prediction rankings and detailed analysis are available in the full article.
